title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium loungewear styling board for Mira Atelier Morning Satin Set, champagne satin lace homewear proposal. Board Structure: horizontal 4:3 brand proposal board with only five large modules: one large hero model panel, one product flat-lay panel, and three big fabric/detail cards. No dense tiny label wall. hero model panel: adult model standing near a bright window in a long robe layered over satin slip, elegant covered styling. Palette: champagne, cream, taupe, muted rose gold; premium editorial brand proposal, soft daylight, refined fabric detail. garment breakdown: flat-lay slip dress, robe layer, strap detail, hem silhouette. detail cards: lace neckline macro, satin drape swatch, robe knit texture. label set: Satin / Lace / Robe / Soft Fit. safety boundary: adult model, fully covered editorial homewear, no erotic framing. Restrictions: adult model only, fully covered editorial homewear, no erotic framing, no see-through nudity, no cheap e-commerce collage, no distorted body, no unreadable label wall.

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium homewear styling board for Luna Home Soft Lounge Set, mist lavender textile proposal. Board Structure: horizontal 4:3 brand proposal board with only five large modules: one large hero model panel, one product flat-lay panel, and three big textile/detail cards. No dense tiny label wall. Hero Model Panel: adult model seated on a linen chair wearing an opaque lavender robe over a matching full-length lounge dress, relaxed catalog styling, fully covered homewear look. Garment Breakdown: flat-lay robe, waist tie, sleeve cuff, layered hem; product shape must be easy to understand. Detail Cards: cotton texture macro, robe belt detail, embroidered edge, each card large enough to read visually. Text Strategy: use only four large short labels: "Cotton", "Robe", "Layer", "Lounge". No long paragraphs, no tiny notes. Palette: mist lavender, ivory, pale grey, cool silver; premium editorial brand proposal, soft daylight, refined textile detail. board theme: mist lavender homewear textile proposal. label set: Cotton / Robe / Layer / Lounge. safety boundary: adult model, fully covered homewear catalog styling, no sleepwear erotic framing. Restrictions: adult model only, fully covered homewear catalog styling, no lingerie, no slip dress, no bedroom posing, no erotic framing, no see-through fabric, no cheap e-commerce collage, no distorted body, no unreadable label wall.
